subcodes.first_line: O seeker of the path of truth! Thou hast endured hardship and toiled arduously. Thou hast become the target of afflictions and the object of the reproaches of thine enemies [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سالک راه حقیقت مشقت دیدی زحمت کشیدی معرض صدمات شدی و مورد شماتت اعدا
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
